category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a C library of Git core methods; official libgit2 docs provide Git API reference and learning center.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name are libgit2; official docs page is titled libgit2.
docs_sources: Official libgit2 documentation page links in-depth guides, samples, authentication docs, and the complete API reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/libgit2/libgit2, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Git core methods; official API reference lists repository, commit, branch, remote, index, diff, merge, and related Git API groups.
